use_cases: Real-time direct messaging between users in web applications
Customer support chat interfaces for websites and apps
Team collaboration messaging features in productivity tools
Healthcare or fintech secure communication interfaces
ai_summary: A chat messaging interface component featuring a user profile header with avatar and online status, scrollable message history with distinct sender styles, and a text input with send functionality. Supports dark mode theming and automatically scrolls to the latest message. Designed as a reusable composite component suitable for embedding in messaging apps, customer support widgets, or social platforms.
